text:
Type Code (Sixth Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the sixth of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of 
the 12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_06_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_06_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_06_11
